title: erythroxylaceae
intro: The Erythroxylaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. Erythroxylaceae is a family that comprises approximately 230 species of plants, primarily found in South America and parts of Asia. This family includes several notable species, such as the coca plant (Erythroxylum coca) and the guayusa plant (Ilex guayusa), which have been used for various purposes including medicinal and recreational uses. Erythroxylaceae is a relatively small but diverse group of plants that are often cultivated for their unique properties and characteristics.
